data.title: Ciena (NYSE: CIEN) beats Q4 expectations with 20.3% revenue growth to $1.35B, EPS of 91 cents. Q1 revenue guidance $1.35B-$1.43B. FY 2026 revenue expected $5.70B-$6.10B.
data.description: Ciena Corp (NYSE: CIEN) exceeded expectations with its fourth-quarter results, reporting a 20.3% year-on-year increase in revenue to $1.35 billion, surpassing the estimated $1.29 billion. The company also beat analyst predictions with an adjusted EPS of 91 cents, above the expected 77 cents. For the first quarter, Ciena anticipates revenue between $1.350 billion and $1.430 billion, higher than the analyst consensus of $1.252 billion, with an adjusted gross margin forecasted at 43%-44%. Looking ahead to fiscal year 2026, the company expects revenue in the range of $5.70 billion to $6.10 billion, exceeding the analyst consensus of $4.71 billion. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: LHV Group acquired own shares on Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange from 05.-11.12.2025.
data.description: LHV Group has disclosed that it purchased its own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange between 05 and 11 December 2025. The exact number of shares acquired during this period has not been specified in the announcement.

data.title: Ripple grows in Europe with AMINA partnership for stablecoin payments, connects with FINMA-regulated Swiss bank.
data.description: Ripple Payments has formed a collaboration with the Swiss crypto bank Amina to integrate its fiat-to-stablecoin payment system with the regulated institution approved by FINMA.

data.title: BlackRock holds a significant interest in Endeavour Mining plc as of 11 Dec 2025 - undisclosed amount.
data.description: Endeavour Mining plc has disclosed that BlackRock, Inc. notified the Company of its ownership interests on December 11, 2025.

data.title: Ultra Pure, LLC gained SQF Certification, a significant achievement in the industrial alcohol market.
data.description: In Darien, Connecticut, on December 11, 2025, Ultra Pure, LLC, a top supplier of bulk beverage and industrial alcohol in the United States, has attained SQF (Safe Quality Food) Certification. This certification serves as a prestigious global standard and symbolizes Ultra Pure's commitment to providing safe and high-quality products.

data.title: RH reported Q3 earnings of $1.71/share, missing analyst estimate by 20.87%. Revenue was $883.81M, beating expectation of $883.69M.
data.description: After market close on Thursday, RH (NYSE: RH) released its third-quarter results. The company reported earnings of $1.71 per share, falling short of the analyst forecast of $2.16 by 20.87%. However, RH exceeded revenue expectations with $883.81 million compared to the estimated $883.69 million. Their revenue saw a 9% increase in the third quarter and a substantial 18% increase over two years. This growth showcases the brand's resilience in a challenging housing market climate. Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Haleon named in Fast Company's 2025 Brands That Matter list in Family of Brands category for cultural moments.
data.description: Haleon, a renowned global company in consumer health based in Warren, N.J., recently made it to Fast Company’s prestigious 2025 Brands That Matter list in the Family of Brands segment. This list celebrates companies that have made significant cultural impacts through various brands under their umbrella. The recognition acknowledges organizations that exhibit cultural significance, establish meaningful connections with consumers, and display a strong dedication to their mission. Haleon expressed immense pride in being honored by Fast Company for their achievements.

data.title: Revenued's 2025 SMB Report reveals small businesses' strategies amidst uncertainty: Tariffs, AI, and Resiliency emphasized.
data.description: Revenued has published its 2025 Year in Review SMB Report focusing on Tariffs, AI Adoption, and the increasing importance of Resiliency in businesses. The report covers key aspects such as Tariffs, AI, and Resiliency trends in the SMB sector. Released on December 12, 2025, the report provides valuable insights for small and medium-sized businesses.

data.title: C3is Inc. closes $9M public offering for ship transportation services.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, C3is Inc. (NASDAQ: CISS), a ship-owning firm offering dry bulk and tanker seaborne transportation services, completed a public offering with gross proceeds totaling around $9 million. This offering was conducted on a reasonable best efforts basis. After accounting for placement agent fees and additional offering expenses, the Company received the aforementioned gross amount.

data.title: Binance refutes claims of freezing only 17% of funds in Upbit hack, sparking questions on cross-border enforcement policies.
data.description: Binance has refuted claims that it only froze approximately 17% of the funds connected to the Upbit hack. This has sparked concerns regarding exchanges' approaches to enforcing laws across borders.

data.title: Global Crossing Airlines confirms annual meeting results: 6 directors elected, stock plans approved, audit firm ratified.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, Global Crossing Airlines Group, Inc. revealed that during a recent meeting, its stockholders have made key decisions. They elected six directors to the board, reapproved the Incentive Stock Option Plan, Restricted Share Unit Plan, and Performance Share Unit Plan of the company. Additionally, they ratified the appointment of Rosenberg Rich Baker Berman P.A. as Global Crossing Airlines Group's independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025. The company's stock trades under the tickers Cboe CA: JET, Cboe CA: JET.B, and OTCQB: JETMF.

data.title: Udemy unveils new offerings at Front Row event for 5,000+ instructors, emphasizes human expertise in AI era.
data.description: In San Francisco, Udemy (Nasdaq: UDMY) introduced new instructor-centered services at the company's Front Row event, attended by over 5,000 worldwide Udemy instructors. These additions highlight the significance of human knowledge in a world influenced by AI. This unveiling occurs amidst a rapid global skill evolution.
